cells.rationale: Well-specified net-new git primitives through an existing runner seam with named prior art and faked-git unit tests; a bounded single-surface everyday implementation, GPT-first.

Threading producer-probe data onto the snapshot while honoring the pure-core boundary, defer-on-inconclusive, and the vacuous-ancestor trap is delicate in-repo idiom and invariant matching that warrants Claude judgment, not opus.
Adding two autopilot_state columns via the established addColumnIfMissing + SCHEMA_STEPS + generic set_autopilot_config pattern is mechanical well-specified work with strong prior art, GPT-first.

The load-bearing quiescence gate, default→base merge direction, non-ff avoidance, and no-double-escalate coupling to finalize/recover form a subtle correctness invariant with architectural cascade — a nameable intelligence-bound opus reason.
Revising ADR 0042 in place plus CONTEXT/CLAUDE/problem-codes under strict prune-not-append and no-re-narration doc discipline is wording-taste and idiom-matching work across surfaces, a sonnet fit.

Capturing the conflicted set producer-side and storing it via event payload across a deterministic-replayed fold — where a live re-probe breaks byte-identical re-fold — is a sacred correctness invariant spanning git/schema/event/fold, a hard opus gate.
An out-of-band read-only classifier report over structured conflict history with a stable shape and a fixture test is bounded well-specified work, GPT-first.
